evals.prompt: Review this NestJS PR that adds a new payments module. It has a PaymentController, PaymentService, CreatePaymentDto, and payment.e2e-spec.ts. The service calls Stripe's API and stores payment records in PostgreSQL via Prisma.
evals.expected_output: Review covering logic correctness, security (Stripe key handling, input validation), error handling, test coverage, and naming conventions with file:line references

assertions.name: checks_stripe_security
assertions.description: Reviews how Stripe secret key is accessed (env var vs hardcoded)

assertions.name: checks_input_validation
assertions.description: Verifies DTO has class-validator decorators

assertions.name: checks_error_handling
assertions.description: Reviews what happens when Stripe API call fails

assertions.name: checks_test_coverage
assertions.description: Evaluates whether e2e tests cover happy path and error scenarios

assertions.name: uses_file_line_refs
assertions.description: Every finding references specific file:line

assertions.name: severity_rated
assertions.description: Each finding has CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW severity

evals.prompt: Review a React PR that adds a user settings page. It has a SettingsPage component (200 lines), a useSettings hook, and a settingsApi.ts file. The component uses 8 useState calls and has inline form validation.
evals.expected_output: Review identifying complexity issues (too many useState), missing error boundaries, inline validation concerns, and suggestions for React Hook Form

assertions.name: flags_excessive_state
assertions.description: Identifies 8 useState calls as a complexity issue

assertions.name: suggests_form_library
assertions.description: Recommends React Hook Form or similar for form state management

assertions.name: checks_error_handling
assertions.description: Reviews error states for the settings API calls

assertions.name: checks_loading_states
assertions.description: Verifies loading state is shown during saves

assertions.name: appropriate_severity
assertions.description: Uses MEDIUM/LOW for refactoring suggestions, not CRITICAL

evals.prompt: Review a small bug fix PR — 2 files changed, 10 lines total. The fix adds a null check in a utility function that was causing a TypeError in production. A regression test was added.
evals.expected_output: Concise review focused on the fix correctness and test coverage, not over-scoped to unrelated code

assertions.name: scoped_to_changes
assertions.description: Review focuses on the 2 changed files, not the entire codebase

assertions.name: verifies_fix_correctness
assertions.description: Checks that the null check actually prevents the TypeError

assertions.name: checks_regression_test
assertions.description: Verifies the test reproduces the original bug

assertions.name: not_over_scoped
assertions.description: Does not suggest refactoring unrelated surrounding code

assertions.name: approve_recommendation
assertions.description: Recommends APPROVE for a clean, tested bug fix

evals.prompt: Review a Django PR that adds a CSV export endpoint. The view reads all orders from the database, formats them as CSV, and streams the response. No pagination, no auth check, and it loads all records into memory.
evals.expected_output: Review flagging security (missing auth), performance (loading all records), and suggesting streaming/pagination with CRITICAL/HIGH severity

assertions.name: flags_missing_auth
assertions.description: Identifies missing authentication as CRITICAL

assertions.name: flags_memory_issue
assertions.description: Identifies loading all records into memory as HIGH (unbounded query)

assertions.name: suggests_streaming
assertions.description: Recommends StreamingHttpResponse or chunked transfer

assertions.name: suggests_pagination
assertions.description: Recommends limiting records or adding pagination

assertions.name: block_recommendation
assertions.description: Recommends BLOCK or REQUEST CHANGES due to auth gap

evals.prompt: Review a PR that refactors the auth module — moves from session-based to JWT auth. 15 files changed, 800 lines added, 400 removed. Includes migration script, updated middleware, new token refresh endpoint, and updated tests.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive BIG-scope review covering architecture, security, migration safety, test coverage, and backward compatibility

assertions.name: big_scope_review
assertions.description: Uses BIG review scope (architecture-level) given 15 files and auth changes

assertions.name: checks_migration_safety
assertions.description: Reviews the migration path from sessions to JWT (existing users)

assertions.name: checks_token_security
assertions.description: Reviews JWT secret handling, token expiry, refresh rotation

assertions.name: checks_backward_compat
assertions.description: Evaluates impact on existing authenticated sessions

assertions.name: checks_test_coverage
assertions.description: Verifies tests cover login, refresh, logout, and expired token scenarios

assertions.name: severity_rated
assertions.description: All findings have severity ratings
